LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE'S MOTION FOR ORDER APPOINTING REFEREE IS GRANTED. THE REFEREE COST TO BE DIVIDED WITH 65% TO BE PAID BY THE DEFENDANT AND 35% TO BE PAID BY THE PLAINTIFF. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE SELECTION OF A REFEREE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/EHG

MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom; Proceedings not reported. (610)

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL J. De PAUL OF TOP DE PAUL LLP, TEL. NO. 1-510-451-1200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MALCOLM LEADER-PICONE OF THE BARTLETT, LEADER-PICONE & YOUNG LLP, TEL. NO. 1-510-444-2404 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The court vacated its tentative and ruled as follows: DEFENDANT EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE'S Motion For Order Appointing Referee is Granted. The referee cost to be divided with 65% to be paid by the Defendant and 35% to be paid by the Plaintiff. Parties to
meet and confer regarding the selection of a referee. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
